    女主心硬手狠事业脑，男主全员美强惨忠犬
「这天下要亡？朕偏要它盛世万年！」  
◆ 开局地狱模式
穿成亡国女帝，头顶【天幕直播灭世惨状】：瘟疫横行、男丁死绝、山河尽焚。  
逼宫的四位逆臣剑指咽喉：“陛下，您只剩三个月。”  
◆ 朕的基建救世指南  
现代社畜拍案而起：种红薯、炼钢铁、造蒸汽机！  
当剖腹产手术震惊朝野，当铁路贯穿蛮荒之地——  
守旧派尖叫：“妖术！” 敌国嘶吼：“抢她！”  
  ◆ 四位大佬画风逐渐不对
冷面太傅：“新政伤民？臣愿为陛下舌战群儒。”  
毒医圣手：“伤她者，试试我的新瘟疫。”  
铁血将军：“百万敌军？正好试炮。”  
黑心财阀：“国库空了？臣赚了十座金矿。”  
◇ 后来——
史书载：“曌武女帝驭四君，开万世太平。”  
凌薇揉腰冷笑：“谁写的手稿？今晚别上龙床！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o18dde86166792ae479484d0bd9074c71~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"泼天富贵到我了","author_id":"","book_id":"7515689122984365080","book_name":"全天下造反大佬，跪求我搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1139,"name":"古风世情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1139&name=古风世情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7515689159780991512","read_count":"70","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"783021"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"251","tags":"古风世情,古言权谋,古代言情,穿越,天灾,基建,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o18dde86166792ae479484d0bd9074c71~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435368&x-signature=fttkCUdMHscjqjeL3u%2Fk0aHK9BU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2986698665365031","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231536089D81CB8011D41E2BC45
